query:
SELECT 
            lpp.learning_path_id,
            lpp.started_at,
            lpp.completed_at,
            lp.estimated_duration_weeks
        FROM learning_path_progress lpp
        JOIN learning_paths lp ON lpp.learning_path_id = lp.id
        WHERE lpp.user_id = $1
        AND lpp.completed_at IS NOT NULL
